harness_changes_from_v1: Spawn mechanism: 'sh run.sh ...' -> 'node plugin/main.js ...' (simulates StreamDock host's bundled-Node CodePathWin execution model declared by manifest.Nodejs.Version='20').
Manifest shape check: required keys list updates from including CodePathMac to including CodePathWin + Nodejs; explicit AA.S1.2.no-mac check that CodePathMac is absent.
AA.S1.3: CodePathWin presence (instead of CodePathMac); also asserts the file's .js extension.
AA.S1.5: OS Platform check flips from 'mac' to 'windows'.
AA.S1.6: added — Nodejs.Version is a non-empty string and CodePathMac is absent (MCA.TDIPA.4 mirror).
AA.S5.3: spawn-command literal check flips from 'osascript' to 'powershell.exe'; additionally asserts 'osascript' is NOT present in music_source.js.

AA.S5.4 literal-presence check: list flips from {'application "Music"','player state','name of current track','artist of current track'} to {'GlobalSystemMediaTransportControlsSessionManager','Windows.Media.Control','TryGetMediaPropertiesAsync','PlaybackStatus'}.
Added explicit MCA assertion records: MCA.TDIPA.4 (Nodejs.Version), MCA.TDIPD.1 (powershell.exe spawn), MCA.TDIPD.2 (SMTC literals) — mirrors of AA assertions on the discovery side.
PNV.1 spawn updated to use Node-direct invocation matching the new manifest entry.
harness_preserves_verbatim: Fixture key MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE (env-var name unchanged from dev-002).
Expected PNV.1 outbound: setFeedback frame to willAppear'd context with title='Bohemian Rhapsody' artist='Queen'.
Mock SDK WebSocket on 127.0.0.1 with random port.
Stub injection scope: limited to the music-source command boundary and the WebSocket peer (AA.S6.3).
Report.json schema and exit code semantics.
assertions_satisfied: AA.S6.2 (PNV.1 ran end-to-end against integrated bundle and passed)
AA.S6.3 (stub injection limited to powershell.exe boundary via MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE + WebSocket peer)
sandbox_caveat: powershell.exe is not present in the linux harness sandbox. MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var bypasses the real powershell.exe spawn so the harness verifies plugin response-logic + SDK message protocol against fixture data. The powershell.exe-to-SMTC boundary itself is verified structurally by AA.S5.4 / MCA.TDIPD.2 literal-presence checks on music_source.js. End-to-end real-Windows-host verification is delegated to the user's installation test on a Windows 10/11 machine with Apple Music for Windows running.
